# sevalla_application_domain (Resource)

Manages a domain for a Sevalla application.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Standard custom domain
resource "sevalla_application_domain" "example" {
  application_id = sevalla_application.example.id
  name           = "app.example.com"
}

# Wildcard domain
resource "sevalla_application_domain" "wildcard" {
  application_id = sevalla_application.example.id
  name           = "*.example.com"
  is_wildcard    = true
}

# Domain with custom SSL certificate
resource "sevalla_application_domain" "custom_ssl" {
  application_id = sevalla_application.example.id
  name           = "secure.example.com"
  custom_ssl_cert = file("certs/cert.pem")
  custom_ssl_key  = file("certs/key.pem")
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `application_id` (String) The ID of the application this domain belongs to.
- `name` (String) The domain name.

### Optional

- `custom_ssl_cert` (String, Sensitive) The custom SSL certificate in PEM format.
- `custom_ssl_key` (String, Sensitive) The custom SSL private key in PEM format.
- `is_wildcard` (Boolean) Whether this is a wildcard domain.

### Read-Only

- `cname_target` (String) The CNAME target for DNS configuration.
- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the domain was created.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the domain is enabled.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the domain.
- `is_primary` (Boolean) Whether this is the primary domain.
- `ssl_status` (String) The SSL certificate status.
- `status` (String) The status of the domain.
- `type` (String) The domain type (custom or system).
- `updated_at` (String) The timestamp when the domain was last updated.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import using application_id:domain_id
terraform import sevalla_application_domain.example fb5e5168-4281-4bec-94c5-0d1584e9e657:a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890
```
